security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' asset: https://api.mapbox.com https://*.tiles.mapbox.com data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://api.mapbox.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:
